Title: Relates to adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the city of Poughkeepsie
Summary: Relates to adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the city of Poughkeepsie.
LawCode: Add §1111-j, V & T L; amd §87, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to adjudications and owner liability for a violation of traffic-control signal indications in the city of Poughkeepsie; to amend the public officers law, in relation to accessing records; and providing for the repeal of certain provisions upon expiration thereof
